ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the member */,
  "nickname" TEXT /* Nickname or alias of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the member */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the member (e.g., Chairman, Vice Chair, Member) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the member joined the organization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the member's record */,
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chapter the member belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of emergency contact */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the member (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_chapter_id FOREIGN KEY ("chapter_id") REFERENCES chapters ("chapter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chapters" (
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chapter */,
  "chapter_name" TEXT /* Name of the chapter */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the chapter */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the chapter */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the chapter was established */,
  "chapter_head" TEXT /* Name of the chapter head */,
  "chapter_status" TEXT /* Status of the chapter (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chapter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the rank (e.g., Sandan, Hachidan) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rank */,
  "min_years" INTEGER /* Minimum number of years required to achieve the rank */,
  "max_years" INTEGER /* Maximum number of years required to achieve the rank */,
  "rank_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for achieving the rank (e.g., forms, sparring, breaking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_ranks" (
  "rank_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank history entry */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rank achieved */,
  "date_achieved" TEXT /* Date the rank was achieved */,
  "certification_number" TEXT /* Certification number for the rank */,
  "promoter" TEXT /* Name of the promoter who awarded the rank */,
  "testing_date" TEXT /* Date of the test or evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_ranks_rank_id FOREIGN KEY ("rank_id") REFERENCES ranks ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_ranks_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Tournament, Seminar, Training) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chapter organizing the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., Upcoming, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Registration deadline for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_chapter_id FOREIGN KEY ("chapter_id") REFERENCES chapters ("chapter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member participating */,
  "participation_type" TEXT /* Type of participation (e.g., Competitor, Attendee) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the member registered for the event */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the training program (e.g., Beginner, Advanced) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training program */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor leading the program */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Status of the program (e.g., Upcoming, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member participating */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the member registered for the training program */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., Attended, Missed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_participants_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_participants_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who is an instructor */,
  "instructor_status" TEXT /* Status of the instructor (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "date_certified" TEXT /* Date the instructor was certified */,
  "certification_number" TEXT /* Certification number for the instructor */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations of the instructor (e.g., forms, sparring, breaking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial transaction */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., Membership Fee, Event Registration, Sponsorship) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Cash, Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the sponsor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sponsor (e.g., Corporate, Individual) */,
  "sponsor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sponsor (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the sponsor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being sponsored */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_date" TEXT /* Date of the sponsorship */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sponsorship */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the sponsorship (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Administrator, Instructor, Member) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., access to events, access to member data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member involved in the communication */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent to the member */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date the communication was sent */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from the member (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., Event Reminder, Payment Due) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message in the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "newsletters" (
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newsletter */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the newsletter */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the newsletter */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the newsletter was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newsletter_id")
)
